recipes.title: Deprecated SDK stream retry
recipes.promise: Catch a prohibited SDK name before it reaches the user, abort the attempt, add a targeted reminder, and release the fixed retry.
recipes.failure_story: A coding assistant keeps recommending an old client constructor across chunk boundaries. A prompt-level rule wastes context on every turn, but a plain output filter either leaks the bad token or blocks a useful answer.
recipes.old_behavior: The first bad stream either reached the user or the whole request failed with no repair path.
recipes.wardwright_behavior: A bounded holdback window detects the split stream match, stops unreleased generation, retries once with a precise reminder, and records both attempts.
recipes.composition: TTSR-style stream guard with a retry route that can move from the local first attempt to a review-capable managed route.

recipes.title: Credential redaction ladder
recipes.promise: Rewrite account-like spans, count related secret matches in session history, and escalate later turns only when repetition makes the session risky.
recipes.failure_story: An assistant can safely redact one account identifier, but repeated related secret-shaped matches in nearby turns suggest the session has drifted into credential handling.
recipes.old_behavior: Every match looked the same: either redact everything forever or alert too early.
recipes.wardwright_behavior: The policy distinguishes a safe rewrite from a state transition, uses bounded session history, and changes future turn routing after the threshold is reached.
recipes.composition: State machine plus stream rewrite policy; future turns can bind the review state to a managed route.
